nasb.text: Nations will see and be ashamed Of all their might. They will put their hand on their mouth, Their ears will be deaf.

esv.text: The nations shall see and be ashamed of all their might; they shall lay their hands on their mouths; their ears shall be deaf;

cnv.text: 願萬國看見， 就為自己的一切勢力而慚愧； 願他們用手掩口， 耳朵變聾。

ccb.text: 列国看见这一切， 都必因自己势力衰微而羞愧， 都必用手捂口，耳朵变聋。
